query: SELECT p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, st.id AS taskId, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') AS ePhotoSyncStatus, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncAttempts') AS ePhotoSyncAttempts, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoFrontStorageUrl') AS frontStorageUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoBackStorageUrl') AS backStorageUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl') AS frontDriveUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl') AS backDriveUrl FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND (p.batchNo LIKE '005%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '013%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '019%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '00500025060%') ORDER BY p.batchNo, st.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, st.id AS taskId, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') AS ePhotoSyncStatus, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncAttempts') AS ePhotoSyncAttempts, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoFrontStorageUrl') AS frontStorageUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoBackStorageUrl') AS backStorageUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl') AS frontDriveUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl') AS backDriveUrl FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND (p.batchNo LIKE '005%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '013%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '019%' OR p.batchNo LIKE '00500025060%') ORDER BY p.batchNo, st.id;
